articles.title: This 29‑Year‑Old Founder Took On a Federal Regulator to Scale Her Company—and Built an $11 Billion Giant
articles.summary: A 29-year-old founder battled federal regulators to grow her startup into an $11 billion company, proving that regulatory friction doesn't always kill ambitious businesses. Her playbook for navigating compliance while scaling fast offers a template that prediction market platforms desperately need as they face their own regulatory gauntlet.

articles.title: Polymarket Taps Palantir, TWG AI to Police Growing Sports Bets
articles.summary: Polymarket hired Palantir and TWG AI to monitor and regulate its expanding sports betting operations. The move signals that even decentralized prediction markets need serious surveillance tech to handle regulatory scrutiny and prevent manipulation as they scale into traditional gambling territory.

articles.title: Everything from the last week of everything is gambling now
articles.summary: The gambling industry expanded into yet another corner of daily life this week, with new betting markets launching on everything from weather patterns to celebrity baby names. When literally everything becomes bettable, prediction markets get both more data to work with and more noise to filter through.

articles.title: How prediction markets are spawning an entire trading industry
articles.summary: Prediction markets have evolved beyond simple betting platforms into a full-fledged trading ecosystem complete with professional traders, sophisticated analytics tools, and institutional-grade infrastructure. This professionalization means sharper odds, deeper liquidity, and better price discovery, but it also raises the bar for casual bettors who now face Wall Street-caliber competition.

articles.title: PolyGun Acquires Polymarket Analytics in a Landmark Deal for the Prediction Market Industry
articles.summary: PolyGun just bought Polymarket Analytics in what's being called a major deal for the prediction markets space. The acquisition signals serious consolidation in the industry and could give PolyGun significantly better data tools to compete with the big players.

articles.title: Recession odds jump on Kalshi after oil tops $100
articles.summary: Oil prices cracked $100 per barrel, sending recession odds soaring on Kalshi as traders bet that energy shocks will tank the economy. Smart money is already positioning for Fed policy pivots and defensive plays, making energy-linked recession markets the new barometer for macro sentiment.

articles.title: Event prediction markets like Kalshi and Polymarket are buzzing in America: Should India allow them too?
articles.summary: India is considering whether to legalize event prediction markets as platforms like Kalshi and Polymarket gain mainstream traction in America. If India opens the floodgates, it would create a massive new market for prediction platforms and could spark similar regulatory shifts across other major economies.

articles.title: How to Prevent Insider Trading on Trump’s Wars
articles.summary: Trump's potential return to office raises serious concerns about government officials using advance knowledge of military actions to profit from defense stocks and related markets. Prediction markets betting on geopolitical events could face massive manipulation if insiders know about planned strikes, troop deployments, or diplomatic moves before they become public.

articles.title: Kalshi Teams Up With Brazil’s XP for First International Push
articles.summary: Kalshi is partnering with Brazilian financial giant XP to expand prediction markets internationally for the first time. This marks a huge step toward global adoption of regulated event betting, potentially opening up massive new liquidity pools and trading opportunities beyond US markets.

articles.title: Trump is the GOAT in GOP endorsements. Prediction markets say how he’ll decide Texas
articles.summary: Trump's endorsement track record in Republican primaries has been nearly flawless, and prediction markets are now pricing how he'll weigh in on upcoming Texas races. His picks move serious money since GOP voters follow his lead with religious devotion, making his endorsement timing and choices pure gold for political bettors.

articles.title: Prediction Markets Are Booming, but I'd Rather Bet on These 3 AI Stocks
articles.summary: Someone's arguing that AI stocks offer better returns than the prediction market boom everyone's talking about. Smart money might be right, since AI companies with actual revenue streams could outperform platforms that just facilitate betting on future events.

articles.title: The CEOs of Polymarket and Kalshi Are Locked in a Bitter Feud
articles.summary: The two biggest prediction market platforms in the US are trading barbs as their CEOs engage in an increasingly public war of words over market share and regulatory positioning. This drama matters because when the industry's top dogs are busy fighting each other instead of focusing on product development and user acquisition, it creates openings for smaller competitors and potentially slows mainstream adoption of prediction markets.
